enriched_points.point_title: Importance of stress physiology in crop breeding
enriched_points.expanded_content: Understanding plant stress physiology enables breeders to select for traits that enhance resilience, vital for developing crop varieties that withstand challenging environmental conditions.
Advanced techniques like marker-assisted selection and genomic selection allow for targeted breeding, enhancing stress tolerance and ultimately improving crop yields in adverse conditions.

enriched_points.point_title: Role of research in sustainable agriculture
enriched_points.expanded_content: Ongoing research in stress physiology informs sustainable agriculture practices, promoting the development of resilient crops that can thrive while minimizing environmental impact and resource use.
